and other things we're working on.

## Meeting Purpose

[Check-in on Owen's onboarding progress and discuss sales process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Owen is adapting well to his new role, feeling confident and comfortable, with minor challenges in Adio CRM](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Kyle aims to optimize sales processes, improve deal qualification, and establish better weekly rituals for the team](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Discussion on implementing KPIs and performance metrics for Owen and future team members](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Kyle will be on vacation next week (May 13-17), with limited availability and potential coverage challenges](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

## Topics

### Owen's Onboarding Progress

  - [Feeling confident and comfortable, progressing faster than expected](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Working closely with Alice and Bruno for guidance](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Mastering PandaDocs and SOWs, creating new deals and notes in Adio](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Main challenge: Getting familiar with Adio CRM layout and functionality](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Needs access to Bruno's email for follow-up communications](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Training nearly complete, with only 1-2 more calls this week](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Sales Process Optimization

  - [Kyle focusing on improving sales operations and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Aim: Maintain fast deal cycles while implementing structural improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Encourages Owen to provide feedback on Adio CRM based on his experience](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Considering implementation of weekly deal review meetings (based on GHOST framework)](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Goals: Prioritize high-value opportunities, avoid calendar overload, and maintain fast-moving sales process](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### Performance Metrics and KPIs

  - [Owen inquired about performance expectations and KPIs](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Kyle to give more thought to quantitative and qualitative metrics](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Initial focus: Qualified meeting rate to optimize limited weekly call slots](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Aim to develop clear metrics for current and future team members](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)

### Upcoming Vacation and Coverage

  - [Kyle on vacation May 13-17 due to son's school closure](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Limited availability, especially on Wednesday, May 15](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Potential coverage challenges with Marcel's overlapping absence](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [May rely on Jason for critical calls on May 15 if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to develop more concrete performance metrics and KPIs for Owen](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Implement and refine weekly deal review meetings](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

  - [Team to plan coverage for Kyle's upcoming vacation (May 13-17)](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Owen to follow up on gaining access to Bruno's email for follow-up communications](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
